title: Israeli president tells Bild: War with Iran needs 'end result', not exact timetable
label: Soft paywall

comments.body: “But we want the Americans to pay for that end result with blood and money, and also clean it up”
They really do think they can conquer a country of 93 million people.

replies.body: They're not planning to conquer. They want to balkanise it.

comments.body: Le résultat final l'erradication des sionistes
They are looking for a final solution.

That’s the same chud that said people don’t understand the nuance of this war and that it’s special.

He literally rocked out with a version of “plz believe me bro I swear this time it’s totally special and easy plz bro.”

Fucking lame.
May the Persians liberate the good people of Israel.
